prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类2024年热度指数65.49（分化观望），较2023年小幅升温4.34点，但推荐与劝退比例接近6:5，社会评价分化；会计/财务/审 计2024年热度指数61.31（推荐），较2023年基本稳定；本省2026年物理类考生约136900人（按历史比例估算），较2025年139478人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；西南财经大学位于四川成都，与重庆相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在重庆招生占比约2.5%–3.5%，属中等偏上水平，近年招生人数持续缩减 ，本地考生报考意愿相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2023年后高位震荡、2026年物理类计划连续缩招约5%、本省考生总数略有下降、声誉平稳无负面冲击、财经类专业 热度分化但优势学科仍具吸引力，在2025年基准12962名基础上预计位次小幅下移；预测最低位次约12519名，区间12019–13019名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9799 → 9352 → 12526 → 13094 → 12962. There was a slight forward shift from 2021 to 2022, but a significant backward shift starting in 2023, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3600 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 12962, slightly higher than 2024, showing a high-level fluctuating trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 191 in 2021, 189 in 2022, 186 in 2023, 186 in 2024, and 178 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction. The 2026 plan is 169, a decrease of 9 (about -5.1%) from 2025. The continuous reduction in enrollment slightly eases competition, leaving room for the ranking number to move downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 66th, with a stable ranking in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with only 1 neutral event (campus reservation policy), and no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 92nd overall, rated as average, with medium-low short video exposure, showing no abnormal signs of increased application interest. No historical abnormal admission records related to Southwestern University of Finance and Economics show signs of gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received A+ (top nationally), Business Administration received A, and Statistics received A-. Enrollment majors such as Finance, Accounting, Public Finance, and Business Administration all correspond to these advantageous disciplines, and the academic strength continues to attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Finance/Economics/Economics categories was 65.49 (differentiated wait-and-see), a slight increase of 4.34 points from 2023, but the recommendation-to-discouragement ratio was close to 6:5, indicating divided social evaluation. In 2024, the popularity index for Accounting/Finance/Auditing was 61.31 (recommended), basically stable compared to 2023. The provincial Physics Category candidate count for 2026 is approximately 136,900 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Chongqing, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5%–3.5%, at an upper-middle level, with enrollment numbers continuously decreasing in recent years, and local candidates' application willingness is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high-level fluctuating trend of historical rankings after 2023, the continuous reduction of about 5% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the provincial candidate count, stable reputation with no negative impact, and divided popularity of finance and economics majors but still attractive advantageous disciplines, the ranking is expected to slightly decrease based on the 2025 baseline of 12962. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12519, with a range of 12019–13019.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12019–13019, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12000), focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors such as Finance (Intelligent Finance and Blockchain Finance) and Accounting (Certified Public Accountant Specialization). If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 13000), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of sliding.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1800 → 1962 → 2095 → 3032 → 2114. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift to rank 3032 (anomalous year), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to rank 2114. Over the past 5 years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating backward shift, with a baseline of approximately rank 2114 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 85 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 74 in 2025, decreasing year by year. The 2026 plan is 68, a decrease of 6 (about -8.1%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment, easing competition, and allowing room for the ranking number to move downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 66th, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 92nd, rated as average, with no abnormal surge in application interest. There are no records of enrollment gaps for Southwestern University of Finance and Economics in historical admission anomalies. Its disciplines include Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, and Statistics A-. The History Category enrollment majors mainly include Finance, Accounting, Law Dual Degree, Public Finance, and Business Administration, all corresponding to advantageous disciplines, with disciplinary strength providing sustained appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Finance/Finance/Economics was 65.49 (differentiated wait-and-see), and for Accounting/Finance/Auditing, it was 61.31 (recommended). Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Chongqing, with strong regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing's History Category is relatively stable, with enrollment numbers continuously decreasing in recent years, and local candidates' application willingness is relatively stable.

预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings (anomaly in 2024 followed by a sharp rebound in 2025), the continuous reduction in History Category enrollment plan by about 8% in 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of provincial candidates, stable reputation with no negative impact, and differentiated popularity in finance and economics majors but still attractive advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of rank 2114, the ranking is expected to shift slightly downward.
